projects.name: Mazika
projects.description: A music streaming UI built with React (Vite) and Material UI. Features dynamic search, trending songs, artist pages, a mini player, and a clean, responsive design. Includes Node.js/Express backend with MongoDB Atlas and SendGrid.

projects.name: Car Zone
projects.description: Android-based car marketplace app developed as part of a university course. Features include user authentication, car listings, video previews, and profile management. Built with JavaFX.

projects.name: Personal Finance Tracker
projects.description: Java desktop app for tracking personal finances, built for Software Component Design course. Implements multiple design patterns including Creational, Structural, and Behavioral patterns with a Swing UI.
